MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT ReturnOrder_Home__dll.AccountId__c AS AccountId__c, ReturnOrder_Home__dll.Status__c AS ReturnStatus__c, count(ReturnOrder_Home__dll.Id__c) AS ReturnCount__c, max(ReturnOrder_Home__dll.CreatedDate__c) AS LastReturnDate__c FROM ReturnOrder_Home__dll GROUP BY ReturnOrder_Home__dll.AccountId__c, ReturnOrder_Home__dll.Status__c
